title: STUDENT CARE CENTRE MANAGER (School-based)
description:
About the role

We are seeking an experienced Student Care Centre Manager to oversee the operations and management of our student care centre. As the Student Care Centre Manager, you will be responsible for ensuring the delivery of high-quality care and educational support to students in a nurturing environment.


What you'll be doing

  1. Providing leadership and oversight of the daily operations of the student care centre
  2. Ensuring programmes and activities are conducted as per set curriculum that support the holistic development of students
  3. Mentoring, developing and managing a team of dedicated student care professionals
  4. Fostering strong relationships with parents and schools
  5. Ensuring compliance with all relevant regulations and policies
  6. Managing the centre's budget and resources effectively
  7. Handle administrative duties
  8. Continuously improving the quality of service and identifying opportunities for growth

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar student care centre supervisory role
  2. Excellent leadership and people management skills
  3. Strong organisational and problem-solving abilities
  4. Demonstrable experience in implementing engaging educational programmes
  5. Sound knowledge of relevant regulations and best practices in the student care industry
  6. Effective communication and interpersonal skills
  7. Passion for working with and supporting the development of children

What we offer

At SELF HELP GROUPS STUDENT CARE LIMITED, we value our employees and strive to create a supportive and rewarding work environment. We offer competitive compensation, opportunities for professional development, and a range of employee benefits, including:

  1. Attractive benefits
  2. Opportunities for career advancement

About us

SELF HELP GROUPS STUDENT CARE LIMITED is a leading provider of high-quality student care services in Singapore under the brand name "BIG HEART STUDENT CARE".

Our aim to create a nurturing and engaging environment where children can thrive academically, socially, and emotionally. With a strong track record of delivering exceptional care and support, we are committed to supporting the holistic development of the students in our care.

If you are passionate about making a positive impact on the lives of students and are excited to join a dynamic and supportive team, we encourage you to apply for this role. We look forward to receiving your application now!

postedCompany.description:
SELF HELP GROUPS STUDENT CARE LIMITED

We are a joint venture company owned by the four Self Help Groups ("SHGs") namely, CDAC, Yayasan Mendaki, SINDA and Eurasian Association. This partnership, initiated by the joint commitment of the four SHGs, aims to help schools to better support the holistic development of our students, especially those from less-advantaged backgrounds, by tapping on the community resources of the 4 SHGs.
postedCompany.name: SELF HELP GROUPS STUDENT CARE LIMITED
